'''Fycor''' was a young [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was in possession of a [[DZ 17X Nemesis]] battle armor. Unfortunately for Fycor, [[Gender/Legends|his]] armor was damaged while he was engaged in range combat with a wanted felon.<ref name="Outlaw Battle Armor" />
